title: Outcasts
summary: A hostile Division 2 faction whose continued activity and developing alliance with the True Sons and Hyenas are confirmed in official seasonal material.

claims.text: The Pact identifies the Outcasts as an active faction with faction-specific Kill Squads, rewards and materials in the Retaliation system.
Official season framing says the leadership of the Outcasts, True Sons and Hyenas are forging a pact and planning a major operation.

paragraphs.text: The Outcasts remain an active hostile faction and enter a developing three-faction alignment with the True Sons and Hyenas in The Pact season.

verification.notes: This is intentionally a limited page. Origin, ideology and named leadership will not be added until direct mission or collectible evidence is captured and registered.
